name: Cream of Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil and mash the potatoes.
2. Add the minced garlic (or substitute with an onion) to the mashed potatoes.
3. Stir in the potato water, salt, and cream until well combined.
4. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
5. Serve immediately, optionally sprinkled with salt wafers for garnish.
6. Serves 4.
